.exit
exit
console.log("now:", await merchantPolicy.isMerchant(merchantAddress));
await merchantPolicy.addMerchants([merchantAddress]);
console.log("currently whitelisted:", await merchantPolicy.isMerchant(merchantAddress));
const merchantPolicy = await ethers.getContractAt("MerchantPolicy", policies[1]);
console.log("policies", policies);
const policies = await policyEngine.getPolicies();
const policyEngine = await ethers.getContractAt("PolicyEngine", policyEngineAddress);
const merchantAddress = "0x66F62255b07b27B2DEB03F51adCB80633e3d0952"; // o el EOA elegido
const policyEngineAddress = "0x9f1ac54BEF0DD2f6f3462EA0fa94fC62300d3a8e"; // del deploy
.exit
await merchantPolicy.getMerchants();
console.log("después whitelisted:", isWhitelisted2); // true
const isWhitelisted2 = await merchantPolicy.isMerchant(merchantAddress);
console.log("merchant agregado:", merchantAddress);
await tx.wait();
const tx = await merchantPolicy.addMerchants([merchantAddress]);
console.log("antes whitelisted:", isWhitelisted);  // false (actualmente)
const isWhitelisted = await merchantPolicy.isMerchant(merchantAddress);
const merchantPolicy = await ethers.getContractAt("MerchantPolicy", "0x93b6BDa6a0813D808d75aA42e900664Ceb868bcF");
policies;
const policies = await policyEngine.getPolicies();
const policyEngine = await ethers.getContractAt("PolicyEngine", policyEngineAddress);
const merchantAddress = "0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3"; // .env
